codeReview.summary: Feature satisfies the pending-accounting contract in scope. Existing parser code already provided one-to-one PendingSection identity, explicit empty/delimiter-only tokenization fallback, aggregate record accounting, and per-object section provenance; commit bab3393 adds regression coverage for the aggregate and per-section mapping gaps without changing parser semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skill still underspecifies the Windows startup path for .factory/init.sh. This worker had to deviate because the prescribed init step is a POSIX shell script and the current Windows shell could not execute it via the available command runner.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The handoff for worker session 7f864142-95e2-4b5a-9cc5-e1f10f4de5ac records a failed attempt to run the init script through Python and notes the deviation in skillFeedback, while mission.md and AGENTS.md already say no environment setup is required on this host.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit bab3393, and current h7cad-native-dwg pending-graph code. The feature is correct and in scope for VAL-PENDING-001/002/003/008/009, and the committed tests now explicitly cover the remaining accounting and object-to-section mapping assertions.
